tasks.subject: Task 0: Generate Supabase types and scaffold feature directories
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `src/types/db.ts` from the live Supabase schema and scaffold all feature module directories.

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types/db.ts", "src/features/"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["src/types/db.ts exports Database type", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Migrate follow-ups feature module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract all types, queries, actions, and rendering from follow-ups pages into feature module.

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/features/follow-ups/", "src/app/follow-ups/page.tsx", "src/app/follow-ups/[id]/edit/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["page.tsx ≤ 70 lines", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final cleanup — remove dead code, verify production build
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove all remaining inline types and Server Actions from pages. Migrate data-hub. Run final build.

**Verify:** `npm run build && npx tsc --noEmit` → both exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/features/data-hub/", "src/app/data-hub/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grep for inline types returns no matches in src/app/", "npm run build exits 0", "npx tsc --noEmit exits 0"]}
```
